invariants: All API routes must validate input with Zod before processing.
Authentication uses JWT tokens issued by our auth service — no third-party auth providers.
Database access must go through Prisma — no raw SQL queries.
All new API endpoints must have corresponding integration tests.
Frontend state management uses React Context + useReducer — no Redux or Zustand.

blocked.name: moment
blocked.reason: Deprecated and large bundle size. Use date-fns instead.

blocked.name: jquery
blocked.reason: Not compatible with React's virtual DOM model.

blocked.name: lodash
blocked.reason: Tree-shaking issues. Use native JS methods or lodash-es.

fileStructure.reason: All React components must live in src/components/ or src/app/
API routes must use Next.js Route Handlers in app/api/

codePatterns.name: State Management
codePatterns.rule: Use React Context + useReducer for complex state — no Redux or Zustand

codePatterns.name: Data Fetching
codePatterns.rule: Use Server Components for data fetching — no client-side fetch in components
